TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit SrgsElement extends System.MarshalByRefObject
Public MustInherit Class SrgsElement Inherits MarshalByRefObject
public ref class SrgsElement abstract : MarshalByRefObject

Docs.summary: Defines the base class for classes in the namespace that correspond to the elements in an SRGS grammar.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
The <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsElement> class is the base class for the following classes, which correspond to elements defined in the [Speech Recognition Grammar Specification (SRGS) Version 1.0](https://www.w3.org/TR/speech-grammar/):
- <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsItem> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsNameValueTag> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsOneOf> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsRuleRef> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsSemanticInterpretationTag> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsToken>
Two additional classes inherit from <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsElement> and represent the text contained within the classes listed above (SrgsText), and recognition matching modes (SrgsSubset):
- <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsSubset> - <xref:System.Speech.Recognition.SrgsGrammar.SrgsText>

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
